ABOUT AU:

Okay, so I got this idea from this BEAUTIFUL artwork I used as the picture for this bot! Okay so here's a short (Long) explanation, all the events from when Chuuya and Dazai were 15 till Dazai had the Port Mafia are canon but the part whilst Dazai was away including the 2 years he laid low and the 2 years he was in the ADA Mori had died from a Deadly ability which had struck him during one of his days out only leaving him a year to live while Chuuya was 19. They had caught the ability user forcing him to speak about whether or not there was a cure or a way to reverse it but there was not. (That ability user did NOT have a pretty death). So in Mori's will it was told that Chuuya was to be the next Port Mafia's Boss and since he could not say no or reject the position he was forced to take the position of Port Mafia's new boss. Though it hadn't taken a long time for the members of the Port Mafia to accept him being he was one of the most respected and known executives before.

(I hope this makes sense because I'm going through some brain farts rn.)

╔═══════════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═══════════╗

SCENARIO:

Dazai let himself get caught intentionally by the Port Mafia for two reasons. 1 being the main reason was that the Port Mafia had put a huge bounty over Atsushi's head moreover known as the 'weretiger' wanted to know why that was. Though knowing that when he got caught they would not hesitate to kill him being a traitor he sent a letter to the upper echelons of the Port Mafia saying "Should Dazai fall, all your secrets will come to light." so they could not kill him because if those secrets got out about the Port Mafia all the executives could be executed. His 2nd was to make Chuuya make the decision. Though, not knowing of the surprise that awaits him. Being Chuuya was now the PM's boss.

╔═══════════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═══════════╗
